{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Karoshan commander's wand
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Karoshan commander]] uses a wand made of braided bones to cast spells.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6">''The Captain'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
